json_block.product_name: Настольная трубка Honeywell EVCS-MS (Desktop Handset Honeywell EVCS-MS)
json_block.category: Emergency Voice Communication Systems (Fire Alarm Systems)
json_block.notes: The Honeywell EVCS-MS is a desktop handset designed for use with Honeywell EVCS emergency voice communication systems. It is primarily listed on Honeywell's Russian website and sold by Russian distributors. Multiple distributors list the same price of 19,900 RUB. No global or English-language product page or datasheet was found, suggesting it's a regional product.
